Index.title: Evaluate Your Property's Earning Potential
Index.subtitle: Find out how much your property could earn, what is stopping it from performing better, and who can help you fix that.

ResultsPlan.introCustomBody: Toggle upgrades from the full catalog. Modeled income uses the same rules as the fixed packages — turn lines on or off and watch costs and net update.

quick_start.title: Get live fast
quick_start.body: Get listed this month with the essentials: cleaning, photos, listing setup, and optional management. Every line below includes its estimated fee — the totals match the services range in the summary cards.

sweet_spot.title: Level up look and yield
sweet_spot.body: Styling, furniture, lighting, bath refresh, photos, and pricing setup so you rank and photograph closer to the top of your area. Each row shows cost and why it moves guest perception and score.

asset_flip.title: Full repositioning
asset_flip.body: Renovation-scale scope: structure per sqm, kitchen, baths, HVAC, locks, licensing. Big-ticket items are separated so you can eyeball how the total forms.
